The '''''Vanquisher''''' was a modified [[Kiltirin-class dungeon ship]] used as a mobile headquarters for the [[Mytaranor Slaving Council]].

It was obtained by [[Talas Piran]], leader of the Slaving Council, during a business trip to [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. It was later essential for the Council to obtain its virtual monopoly on [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] on [[Mytaranor sector/Legends|Mytaranor sector]].
